Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to identify patterns or phases in the readings

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 1 3 Temperature around 20 21 C pressure 1 bar vibration 0 material flow 0 tool position 0 energy around 0 4 0 5 kWh This seems like an idle or standby state no activity low energy no material flow

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 4 6 Temperature jumps to 50 58 C pressure increases to 1 5 bar vibration spikes to 30 38 Hz material flow becomes 5 units s tool position moves to 5 10 mm energy rises to 2 0 3 0 kWh This looks like an active phase with high energy and vibration likely a cutting or machining operation The tool is moving and material is flowing

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Event 7 8 Temperature drops to 40 C pressure up to 2 bar vibration down to 10 Hz material flow reduces to 2 units s tool position stays at 15 mm energy at 2 0 kWh Conditions are still active but less intense Maybe this is a different phase like assembling or joining The tool is stationary at 15 mm so perhaps it is holding or pressing

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 9 Temperature spikes to 80 C pressure remains 2 bar vibration jumps to 50 Hz material flow drops to 0 tool position still 15 mm energy peaks at 5 0 kWh This is a sudden high energy high vibration event with no material flow Could be welding high heat and vibration but no material feed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Event 10 Temperature plummets to 30 C pressure back to 1 bar vibration very low at 1 Hz material flow 0 tool position 15 mm energy drops to 1 0 kWh After the high energy event things cool down quickly Maybe this is a cooldown or inspection phase

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Events 11 12 Temperature 25 C pressure 1 bar vibration 5 Hz material flow starts at 1 unit s tool position moves to 20 mm energy 1 5 1 6 kWh Material flow resumes tool moves perhaps packaging or final assembly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 13 15 Back to baseline temperature 20 21 C pressure 1 bar vibration 0 material flow 0 tool position 0 energy 0 4 0 5 kWh Machine is idle again ready for the next cycle

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 1 Idle Standby Events 1 3 and 13 15 Low readings across the board no activity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2 Cutting Machining Events 4 6 High temperature vibration material flow tool movement classic signs of cutting metal

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: 3 Assembling Joining Events 7 8 Moderate conditions tool stationary at 15 mm material flow reduced Could be pressing or assembling parts

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 4 Welding Event 9 Extreme temperature and vibration spike no material flow tool stationary Welding fits high heat and vibration

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: 5 Quality Inspection Cooldown Event 10 Rapid cooldown low vibration no material flow After welding inspection or cooling down

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: 6 Packaging Finishing Events 11 12 Material flow resumes tool moves to 20 mm moderate energy Likely packaging or final touches

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to assign labels and rationales Let me double check if the transitions make sense After cutting tool moves to 15 mm for assembling then welding at same position then cooldown then packaging with tool moving to 20 mm That seems logical

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Also note that pressure is mostly 1 2 bar not varying much so maybe it is not a key indicator here Vibration and temperature are the main drivers
